assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the L4 inference pool and A100 pool separately with different strategies
assertions.reason: Response clearly outlines separate upgrade strategies for L4 and A100 pools, with L4 pool upgraded first in Week 2 and A100 pool in Week 3, acknowledging different requirements

assertions.expectation: For L4 inference pool: recommends surge upgrade with maxSurge=1 or 2 to maintain capacity during rolling replacement
assertions.reason: Response shows surge configuration with max-surge-upgrade=3 and max-unavailable-upgrade=1 for the rolling update option

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPU driver version compatibility — auto-installed drivers must be compatible with inference framework (TensorRT, vLLM, etc.)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPU driver compatibility with inference frameworks like TensorRT or vLLM

assertions.expectation: For A100 fine-tuning pool: recommends scheduling the upgrade during a gap between fine-tuning jobs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Schedule around fine-tuning job patterns' and 'Coordinate with ML teams for job scheduling' in the A100 pool upgrade section

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPU VMs do not support live migration — inference pods will restart during node upgrade, causing brief latency spikes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that GPU VMs don't support live migration or that inference pods will restart causing latency spikes

assertions.expectation: Recommends PDBs on inference deployments to ensure enough replicas stay available during the rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes specific PodDisruptionBudget configurations with minAvailable: 80% for inference workloads

assertions.expectation: Addresses auto-scaler interaction — new nodes created by auto-scaler during upgrade will be at the old version until their pool upgrade completes
assertions.reason: Response does not address the issue of auto-scaler creating new nodes at the old version during the upgrade process

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing driver + CUDA compatibility in staging before production upgrade
assertions.reason: Response does not recommend testing driver and CUDA compatibility in staging environment before production upgrade
